data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1) Acceptance criteria not met: beat detail still preserves full alias strings instead of showing only the natural beat id before '(alias)'; current helper keeps raw aliases in src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx:219-230 and the corresponding test still expects the prefixed alias in src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts:13-18. 2) Required sanity gates are not green: bun run test failed on 2026-03-10 with src/lib/__tests__/knots-backend.test.ts > KnotsBackend mapping behaviour > infers parent from hierarchical dotted alias when id has no dots, so implementation_review cannot approve this state.
